subject: Access from anywhere, anytime!
body:
Hello Nathan,


We have simplified email accessibility, the admin control panel, email sharing and more with our mobile apps.









Zoho Mail mobile app

Access emails, calendars, contacts and files from one app.

https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zoho.mail https://apps.apple.com/us/app/zoho-mail-email-calendar-contacts/id909262651?ls=1





Zoho Mail Admin mobile app

Reset passwords, manage storage and users, moderate emails and accomplish more with the Zoho Mail Admin mobile app.

https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zoho.mail.admin https://apps.apple.com/us/app/zoho-mail-admin-manage-zoho/id1096516989









Zoho Mail Streams mobile app

Share and discuss emails, assign tasks associated with an email, or leave feedback on content shared with you. Zoho Mail has a new take on team collaboration.
Try the Zoho Mail Streams app now.

https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zoho.mail.streams https://apps.apple.com/us/app/streams-for-zoho-mail/id1146252869?ls=1





Checkout all our  https://www.zoho.com/mail/mobile?src=zmwelcome


Thank you, Zoho Mail Team







Follow us on  https://www.facebook.com/zoho/ https://twitter.com/zohomail?lang=en https://www.linkedin.com/company/zoho-mail/?originalSubdomain=in https://www.instagram.com/zoho/ https://www.youtube.com/c/ZohoMailofficial 


You have received this email because you have signed up for Zoho Mail.

© Zoho Corporation Pvt. Ltd. All rights reserved.
category_desc: Reply to an outreach email we sent

subject: Go beyond Email with Zoho Workplace!
body:
Welcome to Zoho Workplace!


We are so happy you decided to use Zoho Workplace for your business. This productivity and collaboration suite saves the trouble of signing up with multiple vendors for your office apps. Zoho Workplace will help you run your whole business from the ground up.







You can



Host your company email and enhance your communication with https://www.zoho.com/mail?src=wpwelcome.





Stay in touch through chat using https://www.zoho.com/en-in/cliq/?src=wpwelcome or engage and collaborate social media style, with https://www.zoho.com/connect?src=wpwelcome.





Conduct online meetings and web conferences with https://www.zoho.com/meeting/?src=wpwelcome.





Compose full featured documents with https://www.zoho.com/writer/?src=wpwelcome and crunch numbers with https://www.zoho.com/sheet/?src=wpwelcome.





Create beautiful presentations with https://www.zoho.com/show/?src=wpwelcome.





Store, share and manage all your files on cloud with https://www.zoho.com/workdrive/?src=wpwelcome.







*Premium features of the apps are available on our top end plan.


Your Workplace bundle contains these essential business apps. We hope you explore and make the most of Zoho Workplace.


Join our community or send your queries to  mailto:support@zohoworkplace.com


Thank you, Zoho Mail







Follow us on  https://www.facebook.com/zoho/ https://twitter.com/zohomail?lang=en https://www.linkedin.com/company/zoho-mail/?originalSubdomain=in https://www.instagram.com/zoho/ https://www.youtube.com/c/ZohoMailofficial 


You have received this email because you have signed up for Zoho Workplace.

© Zoho Corporation Pvt. Ltd. All rights reserved.
category_desc: Reply to an outreach email we sent

contact.subject: Go beyond Email with Zoho Workplace!

subject: Welcome to Zoho Mail
body:
Hello Nathan,


We are happy to have you onboard!









Join our webinar sessions to discover the power of Zoho Mail.

https://www.zoho.com/mail/webinars/?src=zmwelcome https://www.zoho.com/mail/webinars/recorded-webinars.html?src=zmwelcome





These are some additional resources you can use to help kick start your journey with Zoho Mail.


https://www.zoho.com/mail/complete-guide-to-setup-zohomail.html?src=zmwelcome
https://www.zoho.com/mail/deployment/?src=zmwelcome
https://www.zoho.com/mail/migration/?src=zmwelcome


We roll out feature enhancements every day.

You can catch up with all our latest updates here.

https://www.zoho.com/mail/whats-new.html?src=zmwelcome







In case you need further assistance, write to us on mailto:support@zohomail.com


Thank you, Zoho Mail Team







Follow us on  https://www.facebook.com/zoho/ https://twitter.com/zohomail?lang=en https://www.linkedin.com/company/zoho-mail/?originalSubdomain=in https://www.instagram.com/zoho/ https://www.youtube.com/c/ZohoMailofficial 


You have received this email because you have signed up for Zoho Mail.

© Zoho Corporation Pvt. Ltd. All rights reserved.
